headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -116.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 147% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 163 quotes and 135 at strong intensity, driving a score of 60.1 — people are venting hard today.
• Frustrations are in the upper half of their 164-day range, while Optimism has sunk near its historical floor at -51.8.
• Fears recovered sharply from yesterday's -38.0 to 4.5, while Optimism worsened significantly, suggesting a shift in how negativity is being expressed.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
